title: The Year Dolly Parton Was My Mom
original_title: The Year Dolly Parton Was My Mom
overview: Elizabeth Alison Gray is just your average suburban 11-year old waiting for adolescence to arrive when she finds out her whole life has been a lie. With only her imagination to guide her, she runs away to find the truth.
